message: 🌱 Add kgateway: `glooctl check` Unable to cancel request for mission (#676)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kgateway-4750-glooctl-check-unable-to-cancel-request-for-exec-roundtripper",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kgateway: `glooctl check` Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper",
+    "description": "`glooctl check` Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kgateway troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kgateway deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway -n kgateway --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kgateway configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kgateway configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway\nkubectl get configmap -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kgateway\n```\nGlooctl check returns intermittent error `Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper`\n\n**To Reproduce**\nSteps to reproduce the behavior:\n1. kube apply '...'\n2. curl '....'\n3. See error\n\nIntermittent issue, hard to track down."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for `glooctl check` Unable to cancel request for",
+        "description": "Extend the timeout for listing secrets during `glooctl check` to prevent noisy messages when there is latency in the request. This value, `secretClientTimeoutSeconds`, defaults to 30, and can be configured in `~/.gloo/glooctl-config.yaml`.\n```yaml\nClient: {\"version\":\"1.7.11\"}\nServer: {\"type\":\"Ingress\",\"kubernetes\":{\"containers\":[{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"discovery\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gateway\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"ingress\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm `glooctl check` Unable to cancel request for is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway -n kgateway --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kgateway --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Extend the timeout for listing secrets during `glooctl check` to prevent noisy messages when there is latency in the request. This value, `secretClientTimeoutSeconds`, defaults to 30, and can be configured in `~/.gloo/glooctl-config.yaml`.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Client: {\"version\":\"1.7.11\"}\nServer: {\"type\":\"Ingress\",\"kubernetes\":{\"containers\":[{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"discovery\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gateway\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"ingress\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.7.11\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"}],\"namespace\":\"gloo-system\"}}",
+        "Client: {\"version\":\"1.8.0\"}\nServer: {\"type\":\"Gateway\",\"kubernetes\":{\"containers\":[{\"Tag\":\"1.8.0\",\"Name\":\"discovery\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.8.0\",\"Name\":\"gateway\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.8.0\",\"Name\":\"gloo-envoy-wrapper\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"},{\"Tag\":\"1.8.0\",\"Name\":\"gloo\",\"Registry\":\"quay.io/solo-io\"}],\"namespace\":\"gloo-system\"}}",
+        "....\nChecking virtual services... OK\ntoo many goroutines, only loaded 1024\nW0818 07:33:32.221952   11539 transport.go:260] Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper\nW0818 07:33:32.222104   11539 transport.go:260] Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper\nW0818 07:33:32.222676   11539 transport.go:260] Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper\nW0818 07:33:32.222765   11539 transport.go:260] Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper\nW0818 07:33:32.223593   11539 transport.go:260] Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper\nW0818 07:33:32.223933   11539 transport.go:260] Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper\nW0818 07:33:32.224155   11539 transport.go:260] Unable to cancel request for *exec.roundTripper\nW0818 07:33:32.224382   11539 transport.go:260] Unabl"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
